claim_boundary: The contact sheet indexes already registered render figures and selected media. It does not introduce new evidence, experiments, metrics, VLM runs, or navigation runs.
change_summary: Recomposed the review-packet media manifest as a 1800x2200 portrait board.
Added a dedicated extended render-evidence row using registered render-scene evidence figures.
Added registered supplement render-atlas and navigation media-boundary sources to the contact-sheet registry.
Narrowed spacing while keeping deterministic row labels and figure-source boundary text.
Raised the ACL supplement include from 0.68 to 0.78 textheight so the one-column page uses the available paper scale.

visual_review.mode: Local pure visual review following render-visual-reviewer protocol. No independent subagent was spawned because the available spawn_agent tool requires explicit user authorization for delegation.
visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: five deterministic rows are contained; row labels, thumbnails, and source-boundary text do not overlap.
visual_review.pdf_page: PASS: page 42 uses the available one-column page height without caption collision or clipping. Pages 41 and 43 remain intact.
visual_review.dense_crops: PASS: render rows, VLM/navigation rows, and caption-area crops remain readable at paper scale.
visual_review.residual_risk: Some source-figure text inside thumbnails is intentionally small; the contact sheet is an index, not a replacement for the referenced full figures.
